description: A customer calls to cancel an order that was placed yesterday.

nodes.task_description: Find the customer's sales order and check its current status.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the order and sees its status is 'Sent to Warehouse', but not yet 'Shipped'.

nodes.task_description: Since the order has not yet shipped, cancel the order in the system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully changes the order status to 'Cancelled'.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the cancellation with the customer and notify the warehouse to halt the shipment.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly communicates the cancellation and a notification is automatically sent to the warehouse.
